summary: Phase 2B+ Testing Complete: Orion Voice Assistant, Quick Photo Report, Road Status Overlay - All features working. Frontend: 100% pass rate on all tested features.
critical_code_review_comments: Orion Voice Assistant correctly implements Web Speech API with fallback to quick action buttons
Quick Photo Report has proper safety guardrails (passenger mode, gallery always allowed)
Road Status Overlay uses MOCK_ROAD_SEGMENTS constant for traffic data
All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented for testing
Quick action buttons (hazard, accident, construction, police) appear when speech recognition is not supported or fails
test_credentials: No authentication required - uses mock data
seed_data_creation: Backend uses in-memory mock data with MOCK_ROAD_SEGMENTS for road status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2B+ complete. Orion Voice Assistant with Web Speech API (fallback to quick actions), Quick Photo Report with safety features (passenger mode), Road Status Overlay with mock traffic data. All features integrated into Map tab.
mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Road status uses MOCK_ROAD_SEGMENTS constant. User location is mock (Columbus, OH: 39.9612, -82.9988).
